pickup.name: Siren Crystal
pickup.effect: Emits a high-frequency vibration that shatters brittle structures

encounters.trigger: The defeat of the crab causes a rockslide, revealing the path to the Kelp Forest.

pickup.name: Magma Core
pickup.effect: Heats the surrounding water to melt ice or ward off frost creatures

encounters.trigger: The serpent's death song resonates with the Siren Crystal, opening a hidden vortex leading to the Frozen Grotto.

pickup.name: Sunken Earth Relic
pickup.effect: Enhances geomancy to manipulate seafloor tectonic pressure

encounters.trigger: As the jellyfish melts, its core sinks into a pedestal, unlocking the door to the Boss Chamber.

boss.name: Leviathan of the Deep Rift
boss.victory_condition: Use the Sunken Earth Relic to bury the Leviathan under the tectonic plates of the rift.

level.objective: Navigate the deep trench to find the source of the mysterious tremors.
level.reward: The Heart of the Ocean and Level 10 Geomancy Mastery.

pickup.name: Phosphorescent Sea Slug
pickup.effect: Grants light and a mild toxic coating to weapons

encounters.trigger: The slug's glow reveals a hidden passage to the Crystal Grotto.

pickup.name: Enchanted Pearl
pickup.effect: Creates a temporary shield of compressed water

encounters.trigger: The Pearl's resonance vibrates through the ground, awakening the Ancient Guardian.

pickup.name: Siren's Flute Shell
pickup.effect: Emits a high-frequency calming chime

encounters.trigger: The flute's melody calls the Giant Whale King from the abyss.

boss.name: Giant Whale King
boss.victory_condition: Use the Siren's Flute Shell to lull the Whale King back to sleep.

level.objective: Navigate the coral gardens to calm the restless Whale King and restore peace to the ocean floor.
level.reward: Beastmaster Rank: Guardian of the Tides

level.setting: The Abyssal Trench of the Forgotten Martyrs

enemy.name: Spectral Kelp Horror
enemy.weakness: Soul-Reaping strikes from the Scythe of the Drowned Soul

pickup.name: Vial of Abyssal Ichors
pickup.effect: Corrodes ancient spectral armor

encounters.trigger: The Horror's death cry shatters a seal, opening the gate to the Bioluminescent Cavern.

enemy.name: Armored Bone-Crab
enemy.weakness: Exposure to the Vial of Abyssal Ichors

pickup.name: Ossified Relic
pickup.effect: Summons a skeletal vanguard to distract high-health targets

encounters.trigger: The weight of the dying Crab triggers a pressure plate, revealing the Sunken Cathedral.

pickup.name: Prism of Despair
pickup.effect: Inverts the healing factor of undead deities

encounters.trigger: The Lich's soul shard acts as a key to the Heart of the Abyss where the Great Kraken resides.

boss.name: Leviathan the Necrotic
boss.victory_condition: Use the Prism of Despair to turn the Leviathan's regeneration against itself while striking its eye with the Scythe.

level.objective: Reclaim the sunken throne by defeating the corrupted guardians of the trench.
level.reward: The Crown of the Deep Tide, granting permanent control over aquatic undead.

level.setting: The Abyssal Trench of Crackling Vents

pickup.name: Hyper-Oxygenated Kelp
pickup.effect: Restores 50 health and increases movement speed

encounters.trigger: Opening the kelp seal attracts the Trench Sentinel

pickup.name: Conductive Eel Scale
pickup.effect: Increases electrical weapon conductivity

encounters.trigger: The Sentinel's death roar collapses the seafloor leading to the Volcanic Core

pickup.name: Static Discharge Core
pickup.effect: Emits a massive electrical burst on impact

encounters.trigger: Placing the Core into the pedestal summons the Ancient Kraken

boss.name: The Ancient Kraken
boss.victory_condition: Detonate the Static Discharge Core inside the Kraken's maw

level.objective: Descend into the Abyssal Trench to neutralize the corrupted heart of the ocean.
level.reward: The Eye of the Storm Relentless Storm

level.setting: The Abyssal Trench of Sunken Whispers

pickup.name: Phosphorescent Gland
pickup.effect: Illuminates dark tunnels and blinds light-sensitive foes

encounters.trigger: Opening the Kelp Gate triggers the descent into the Deep Vent.

pickup.name: Vial of Brine Acid
pickup.effect: Dissolves ancient reinforced plating

encounters.trigger: Melting the rusted bulkhead reveals the entrance to the Sunken Cathedral.

pickup.name: Shard of the Abyss
pickup.effect: Enhances blade with shadow energy

encounters.trigger: Placing the Shard into the Altar summons the Trench Guardian.

boss.name: The Trench Guardian
boss.victory_condition: Shatter the Guardian's core using the empowered Shard of the Abyss

level.objective: Recover the Heart of the Sea from the deepest trench.

level.setting: A pressurized underwater volcanic trench filled with turbulent thermal vents and steam bubbles.

pickup.name: Magnesium Flare
pickup.effect: Blinds enemies and increases fire damage by 20%.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Krill causes a structural collapse, forcing the player into the Coral Catacombs.

pickup.name: Thermite Harpoon
pickup.effect: Deals massive damage over time and pierces heavy armor.

encounters.trigger: The Stalker's death cry echoes through the trench, summoning a guardian to the Obsidian Maw.

pickup.name: Hyper-Oxygenated Fuel Cell
pickup.effect: Doubles the range and heat intensity of all pyromancy abilities.

encounters.trigger: The Crustacean's shell explodes upon death, revealing the entrance to the Abyssal Throne.

boss.name: Trench Wyrm King
boss.victory_condition: Inject the fuel cell into the Wyrm's open gills to trigger a lethal internal combustion.

level.objective: Navigate the boiling trenches to assassinate the Wyrm King and stabilize the undersea volcano.
level.reward: The 'Ever-Burning Heart' artifact, granting infinite oxygen and fire immunity.

level.setting: The Abyssal Trench of Forgotten Souls

pickup.name: Shock-Conducting Resin
pickup.effect: Adds electrical damage to the next 3 attacks

encounters.trigger: The scent of ichor attracts a scavenger from the deeper vents.

pickup.name: Ultrasonic Frequency Emitter
pickup.effect: Stuns bio-luminescent creatures for 5 seconds

encounters.trigger: The vibrations from the emitter disturb the slumber of the Void Serpent.

pickup.name: Pressurized Oxygen Core
pickup.effect: Instantly heals 50 health and increases movement speed

encounters.trigger: The release of pressurized gas signals the Warden of the Abyss to defend its territory.

boss.name: Krakos the Trench Sovereign
boss.victory_condition: Detonate the Oxygen Core inside the Sovereign's mouth during its inhale phase

level.objective: Infiltrate the deep trench and eliminate the Sovereign to restore the ocean's balance.
level.reward: Legendary Seal of the Deep Warden

pickup.name: Prismatic Pearl
pickup.effect: Blinds enemies with light

encounters.trigger: Opening the Pearl Clam reveals the path to the Jellyfish Grove.

pickup.name: Whistle Shell
pickup.effect: Plays a high-pitched tune

encounters.trigger: The jellyfish dance away, clearing the route to the Sunken Tea Party.

pickup.name: Golden Tea Biscuit
pickup.effect: Lures hungry sea creatures

encounters.trigger: The crab retreats into its shell, unveiling the gate to the Boss Lagoon.

boss.name: Barnaby the Bubbling Whale
boss.victory_condition: Feed Barnaby the Golden Tea Biscuit to stop his sneezing fits

level.objective: Calm the sneezing whale to restore peace to the garden

level.setting: Overgrown Temple of the Jaguar King

pickup.name: Vial of Serpent Venom
pickup.effect: Adds poison damage to weapon

encounters.trigger: The crocodile's death roar awakens the swarm in the canopy.

pickup.name: Blessed Totem of Warding
pickup.effect: Reduces physical damage taken by 50%

encounters.trigger: The Alpha drops a stone key that unlocks the temple gate.

pickup.name: Sun-Shard Mirror
pickup.effect: Reflects intense beams of light

encounters.trigger: The panther's blood flows into the altar, summoning the temple guardian.

boss.name: Kozotl the Sun-Eater
boss.victory_condition: Reflect the boss's solar beam back into its chest eye three times.

level.objective: Infiltrate the chaotic heart of the temple and slay the corrupted sun god.

enemy.name: Barbed Vine-Stalker
enemy.weakness: Sylvan Longbow precision shots to the glowing core

pickup.name: Fire-Starter Flint
pickup.effect: Allows player to ignite arrow tips for a single encounter

encounters.trigger: A rusted gate swings open, revealing a path deeper into the marsh

pickup.name: Silver Serpent Scale
pickup.effect: Grants immunity to venomous strikes

encounters.trigger: The creature's death roar causes a rockslide, exposing the Ancient Altar

enemy.name: Shadow Jaguar
enemy.weakness: Light reflected off the Silver Serpent Scale

pickup.name: Essence of the Sun
pickup.effect: A radiant crystal that dispels unnatural darkness

encounters.trigger: A beam of light pierces the canopy, illuminating the Boss Arena

boss.name: Kallos the Eternal Bloom
boss.weakness: Essence of the Sun placed in the central pedestal
boss.victory_condition: Purify the Bloom by inserting the Essence and surviving for 60 seconds

level.objective: Traverse the jungle to find and purify the corrupted heart of the forest.
level.reward: The 'Emerald Guardian' Title and a permanent Agility boost

pickup.name: Vial of Orchid Sap
pickup.effect: Stops bleeding and increases movement speed

encounters.trigger: The Raptor's dying screech awakens a territorial Silverback Guardian nearby.

pickup.name: Jagged Obsidian Shard
pickup.effect: Adds fire damage to the next three attacks

encounters.trigger: The Guardian's collapse breaks a seal on the Temple of the Sun.

pickup.name: Mirror-Polished Scale
pickup.effect: Reflects light and magical projectiles

encounters.trigger: The Shaman's mask shatters, summoning the Jungle Spirit for a final confrontation.

boss.name: The Blight-Winged Serpent
boss.victory_condition: Reflect the Serpent's Gaze three times to petrify it, then deliver a final blow with the Kukri.

level.objective: Infiltrate the heart of the jungle and slay the source of the rot.
level.reward: The Eye of the Jungle artifact and Legendary Rogue Title.

pickup.name: Sun-Infused Pollen
pickup.effect: Increases staff glow and blinds insects

encounters.trigger: A path opens through the dense brambles toward the Sunken Hollow

pickup.name: Moonlight Nectar
pickup.effect: Restores health and purifies poison

encounters.trigger: The buzzing stops, revealing a hidden stone bridge to the Great Lotus

pickup.name: Ancient Seed of Purity
pickup.effect: Weakens the source of the jungle's corruption

encounters.trigger: The pond water clears, showing the entrance to the Heart of the Forest

boss.name: The Overgrown Blight-Titan
boss.victory_condition: Plant the Ancient Seed in the boss's core

level.objective: Restore the natural balance of the jungle by cleansing the Blight-Titan
level.reward: Guardian's Mantle and the title of Forest Protector

level.setting: The Whispering Mangroves of the Obsidian Delta

pickup.name: Essence of Decay
pickup.effect: Enhances necrotic damage for 60 seconds

encounters.trigger: A stone altar sinks into the mud, opening the path to the Sunken Shrine.

pickup.name: Shattered Bone Amulet
pickup.effect: Grants immunity to spectral drain

encounters.trigger: The Guardian's death scream shatters a nearby stone barrier, revealing the Heart of the Grove.

pickup.name: Vial of Ancient Ichor
pickup.effect: Greatly increases mana regeneration

encounters.trigger: A blood-red moon rises, summoning the Avatar of Rot to the central temple.

boss.name: Avatar of Rot
boss.victory_condition: Empty the Avatar's health pool while the Ichor is active to prevent regeneration.

level.objective: Traverse the cursed jungle to find and neutralize the source of the fungal rot.

pickup.name: Sweet Nectar Syphon
pickup.effect: Restores 20 health and tastes like honey

encounters.trigger: Opening the Nectar Jar attracts a buzzing swarm that leads to the next clearing

pickup.name: Refined Solar Yeast
pickup.effect: Increases flask damage by 10

encounters.trigger: The dispersing pollen reveals a hidden path paved with giant glowing mushrooms

pickup.name: Prismatic Enzyme
pickup.effect: Adds a rainbow shimmer to all potions

encounters.trigger: The vine-cat retreats into a hollow log that serves as the entrance to the boss arena

boss.name: The Grand Giggling Gorilla
boss.victory_condition: Cover the Gorilla in rainbow bubbles until he laughs himself into a nap

level.objective: Collect rare ingredients to create the Ultimate Elixir of Joy
level.reward: The Golden Cauldron of Endless Bubbles

pickup.name: Sunlight Essence Vial
pickup.effect: Illuminates hidden path and burns spectral foliage

encounters.trigger: Opening the Sun-Sealed Gate leading to the Sunless Grove

pickup.name: Clockwork Heartstone
pickup.effect: Restores 50 health and stabilizes local time loops

encounters.trigger: Activating the Monolith of Ages to reveal the Bridge of Sighs

pickup.name: Chrono-Stabilizer Lens
pickup.effect: Forces an entity into a fixed temporal state

encounters.trigger: Lowering the Drawbridge to the Heart of the Jungle

boss.name: The Aeon Serpent
boss.victory_condition: Freeze the Serpent in time and shatter its core

level.objective: Retrieve the Seed of Eternity from the heart of the jungle.
level.reward: Mastery of the Chronos Sphere ability

pickup.name: Corrosive Bile Vial
pickup.effect: Applies a permanent acid debuff to the next enemy hit.

encounters.trigger: A massive vine wall withers, revealing the path to the Overgrown Temple.

pickup.name: Sharpening Whetstone
pickup.effect: Increases weapon damage by 50 percent for the remainder of the level.

encounters.trigger: The temple floor collapses, dropping the player into the Sunken Arena.

pickup.name: Primal Fetish
pickup.effect: Grants 5 seconds of invincibility when health drops below 10 percent.

encounters.trigger: A terrifying roar echoes through the arena, summoning the boss from the canopy.

boss.name: The Blighted Apex Predator
boss.victory_condition: Reduce boss health to zero while surviving its final enrage phase.

level.objective: Navigate the desolate jungle to hunt down the source of the rot.
level.reward: God-Slayer Title and the Berserker's Heart Passive Skill.
